texto: The Moral of life: is not to make lemonade, is not to bite through the hard times, Not to have loss.For you will lose. Hard times do get the best of you. Life doesnt allways hand you lemons. Make the very best of what you have. there are times that you shall doubt yourself. insted reach for apples!Make the best of yourself, Have pride in what you do. You start a Nobody achieve as much as you can and become the best you can. No one has heard of Franklin Stinnett but yet i still get up I try to put words of the wise into anyone i meet.
explicacao: Citação de franklin stinnett sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “The Moral of life: is not to make lemonade, is not to bite through the hard times, Not to have lo…” articula reflexao, meaning-of-life, times em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e reflexao.
